layout_strategies.mobile_first: Stack vertically on mobile, expand to grid on md/lg

buttons.primary: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(220,38,38,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(220,38,38,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-neutral-700 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 transition-all

cards.product: group relative bg-[#171717] border border-neutral-800 hover:border-red-600/50 transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden rounded-sm
cards.category: relative h-full w-full overflow-hidden rounded-sm border border-neutral-800 group hover:border-red-600 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-neutral-800 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-600 focus:border-red-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-600 rounded-sm h-12

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-neutral-800
navigation.link: text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-neutral-400 hover:text-white transition-colors

hero.alt: Mechanic working on engine in dark workshop

general: Implement the 'Performance Pro' archetype: Dark mode by default, sharp edges, high contrast.
Use 'Chivo' font for all headings (uppercase, tight tracking) and 'Manrope' for body.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid #0A0A0A or #171717.
Use the provided image URLs for the specific categories. Do not use placeholders.
Ensure all forms (Request Part) have a dark theme with light borders.
Integrate WhatsApp floating button on all pages.
Use Bento Grid layout for the Categories section on the Homepage.
For the Catalog, use a sidebar filter layout with a dense product grid.

pages.home: Hero section must use the mechanic image with a dark overlay and a central search bar. Categories below in a Bento grid.
pages.catalog: Sidebar with filters (Category, Price, Condition). Product cards should be minimal: Image + Title + Price + 'Ver Detalhes' button.
pages.product_detail: Large image on left, details on right. 'Solicitar Peça' button must be prominent and open a WhatsApp link or form.
pages.request_form: Multi-step or long form. Fields: Name, Phone, Car Model, Year, Part Description, Photo Upload. Submit -> WhatsApp API.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers only.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles: sharp corners (rounded-sm) for this industrial theme.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
